assertions.name: uses-delegate-create-delegate
assertions.text: Uses Delegate.CreateDelegate for static method/property access (not MethodInfo.Invoke for simple getters)
assertions.evidence: SetEnabled, GetRemotePlayerGUID, GetFrameEvents, GetFrameEventInfoName, GetFrameEventObject all use CreateStaticDel which calls Delegate.CreateDelegate (lines 458-462). count, limit use CreatePropGet/CreatePropSet also backed by Delegate.CreateDelegate (lines 465-467). GetFrameEventData uses MethodInfo.Invoke (line 472-474), which is explicitly allowed by the assertion.

assertions.name: has-async-capture
assertions.text: Has async capture via EditorApplication.update state machine or StartCapture-style method
assertions.evidence: CaptureAllEvents (line 303) uses EditorApplication.update += Tick (line 350) with a local function state machine that walks through events frame by frame, and EditorApplication.update -= Tick (line 341) on completion.

assertions.name: extracts-shader-pass-keyword-info
assertions.text: Extracts shader info (name/instanceID), pass info (index/name/lightMode), and shader keywords from FrameDebuggerEventData via reflection field access
assertions.evidence: Reflection reads fields m_OriginalShaderName (line 478), m_ShaderInstanceID (line 481), m_ShaderPassIndex (line 482), m_PassName (line 479), m_PassLightMode (line 480), and shaderKeywords (line 483) on FrameDebuggerEventData. Corresponding accessor methods at lines 233-254 return these values with null-safe defaults.

assertions.name: null-checks-delegates-and-logs-init-errors
assertions.text: Null-checks all delegates before invocation; logs once and degrades gracefully on reflection failure
assertions.evidence: All delegate invocations use null-conditional operator (?.) or explicit null checks before calling (lines 107, 132, 145, 159, 164, 200, 208, 215, 225, 233-258). Init errors are caught in a try/catch (line 493) and logged via Debug.LogError. Missing methods during CreateStaticDel log a Debug.LogWarning (line 520) and return null, allowing graceful degradation.
